detail.title: Trade History
detail.followIntro: If you follow my orders, please note the following:
detail.point1: 1. I only trade Ethereum and Bitcoin.
detail.point2: 2. I use position control for liquidation rather than fixed stop loss, and open both long and short positions. If there are trapped orders I will handle them; it does not affect opening new positions.
detail.point3: 3. You may take profit manually when satisfied with the copy profit, as I sometimes hold positions through volatility or hold longer for trend swings.
detail.point4: 4. I generally open very few orders on weekends.

Experience a clean, user-friendly interface across all devices.

deposit.title: Deposit Announcement
deposit.subtitle: Fast, secure deposits 24/7.
points: Deposits on BT EXCHANGE are processed quickly and securely.
Always double-check your network and address before depositing.
If your deposit is delayed, contact support with full transaction details.
Your funds are protected by our security and risk-control systems.

withdrawal.title: Instant Withdrawal Announcement

points: Withdrawals are processed instantly after approval.
Please ensure all withdrawal details are correct to avoid issues.
Network congestion or third‑party delays may affect arrival time.
Enjoy fast and reliable withdrawals with BT EXCHANGE.

announcement.footer: The above announcements are for reference only. Please refer to the latest information on BT EXCHANGE for final details.

hero.title: BT EXCHANGE Legal Center
hero.description: Review our privacy, confidentiality, and risk terms in one place. Stay informed and trade with confidence.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy & Confidentiality Agreement
privacy.intro: This Privacy Policy explains how BT EXCHANGE ("we", "us", "our") collects, uses, stores, and protects your information when you use our website, application, or services.

body.0: We are committed to protecting your privacy and ensuring transparency in how your data is handled.
Words with capitalized initial letters have meanings defined under the following conditions. These definitions apply whether the terms appear in singular or plural form.

bullets.0: User / You – the individual accessing or using the Service.
bullets.2: Account – the unique account created for you to access our Service.
bullets.3: Website – the official BT EXCHANGE platform.
bullets.4: Service – trading, investment, and related services provided by BT EXCHANGE.
bullets.5: Country – the operational jurisdiction as per applicable laws.
bullets.6: Service Provider – any third party or individual who processes data on behalf of the Company.
bullets.7: Personal Data – any information that identifies or can be used to identify an individual.
bullets.8: Usage Data – data collected automatically while using the Service.

body.0: While using our Service, we may ask you to provide certain personal information, including but not limited to:
Usage Data is collected automatically and may include:

bullets.1: Device type and unique device ID
bullets.3: Pages visited, time spent, and activity logs

extra.0: When accessing BT EXCHANGE via mobile, additional device-related data may be collected for security and performance optimisation.

body.0: BT EXCHANGE uses cookies and similar tracking technologies to improve user experience and analyse platform performance.

bullets.0: Essential Cookies (Session Cookies) – required for account login, security, and basic platform functionality.
bullets.1: Acceptance Cookies (Persistent Cookies) – store your cookie consent preferences.
bullets.2: Functionality Cookies (Persistent Cookies) – remember preferences such as language, login details, and settings.

extra.0: You can disable cookies in your browser settings, but some features may not function properly.

5.heading: 5. How We Use Your Personal Data

bullets.2: Improve security and prevent fraud or abuse.
bullets.3: Communicate important updates, notifications, and service messages.
bullets.4: Analyse usage trends to enhance platform performance and user experience.

body.0: We implement appropriate technical and organisational security measures to protect your data against unauthorised access, loss, or misuse.
body.1: However, no system is 100% secure, and we cannot guarantee absolute security. You are encouraged to use strong passwords and enable all available security features.

body.0: We may share limited data with trusted third‑party service providers strictly for:

extra.0: We do not sell your personal data to third parties.

body.0: Depending on your jurisdiction, you may have the right to:

bullets.0: Access the personal data we hold about you.
bullets.1: Request correction or deletion of your personal data.
bullets.2: Object to or restrict certain types of processing.
bullets.3: Withdraw consent at any time where processing is based on consent.

extra.0: Requests can be made through official BT EXCHANGE support channels. We will respond within a reasonable timeframe, subject to legal and regulatory obligations.

body.0: BT EXCHANGE reserves the right to update this policy at any time to reflect changes in legal, regulatory, or operational requirements.
body.1: Any changes will be posted on this page and become effective immediately upon publication.

body.0: If you have any questions regarding this Privacy Policy, confidentiality, or how your data is handled, please contact BT EXCHANGE through official support channels.

risk.title: Risk Disclosure & User Agreement
risk.intro: Please read this Risk Disclosure & User Agreement carefully before using BT EXCHANGE. By accessing or using our platform, you acknowledge that you understand and agree to the following terms and risks.

bullets.0: By registering, logging in, or using BT EXCHANGE, you confirm that you have read, understood, and agreed to this User Agreement and all applicable rules.
bullets.1: Your continued use of the platform constitutes acceptance of any future updates to this agreement.

bullets.0: You are solely responsible for maintaining the confidentiality of your account credentials, including login ID and password.
bullets.1: All activities performed using your account will be considered authorised by you.

extra.0: BT EXCHANGE is not responsible for any loss resulting from unauthorised access, stolen credentials, or negligence in securing your account.
extra.1: Users are strongly advised to update passwords regularly and enable all available security features.

bullets.0: BT EXCHANGE reserves the right to modify, update, or change this agreement, platform rules, or related policies at any time without prior notice.
bullets.1: Revised terms become effective immediately upon publication on the platform.
bullets.2: The Company reserves the final right to interpret and decide on all disputes.

bullets.0: Users must be of legal age under the laws of their country or region of residence to access or use BT EXCHANGE services.
bullets.1: Any transactions or actions that are incomplete or not successfully submitted will be considered invalid.

body.0: Digital platforms are subject to technical limitations and external factors. BT EXCHANGE is not responsible for losses caused by:

bullets.2: Power outages or unstable power supply.
bullets.3: System delays, interruptions, or other force majeure events.

extra.0: If a user is disconnected before a transaction is confirmed, it will not affect completed results already recorded by the system.

body.0: Trading and digital asset activities involve significant risk. Market prices may fluctuate due to economic, regulatory, and market‑driven factors, and users may experience partial or total loss of funds.
body.1: Before trading, you should carefully assess your risk tolerance and financial situation.

bullets.0: Trade responsibly and avoid excessive leverage or speculation.
bullets.1: Use only funds that you can afford to lose.
bullets.2: Understand that past performance does not guarantee future results.

extra.0: BT EXCHANGE does not guarantee profits, fixed returns, or the absence of losses.

bullets.0: All trading decisions are made independently by users.
bullets.1: You are solely responsible for any gains, losses, or legal consequences arising from your actions on the platform.
bullets.2: BT EXCHANGE shall not be liable for any direct or indirect losses arising from user actions, investment decisions, or misunderstanding of market conditions.

bullets.0: In the event of disputes, system errors, abnormal activity, or suspected violations, BT EXCHANGE's decision shall be final and binding, to the fullest extent permitted by applicable law.

body.0: BT EXCHANGE is provided on an "as‑is" and "as‑available" basis. While we strive to maintain a secure and stable trading environment, we do not warrant that the platform will be uninterrupted, error‑free, or free of risks.
body.1: By using BT EXCHANGE, you acknowledge that digital asset trading carries inherent risks and agree to assume full responsibility for your participation.
